prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年湖南大学在北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约5971名、6248名、6861名、6693名、6561名。整体呈先降后稳走势：2021至2023年位次持续后移（从 5971降至6861），2024年略有回升至6693，2025年进一步回升至6561，近两年出现回暖迹象。2025年基准位次约6561名；湖南大学在北京市综合类招生计划：20 21年63人、2022年68人、2023年68人、2024年70人、2025年70人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势。2026年计划招生72人，较2025年增加2人，扩招幅度约2.86%。扩招使竞争略有 加剧，位次数字有增大压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校。软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第29–32位（2026年第31位），属于国内顶尖高校 行列，对北京考生有较强吸引力；湖南大学在2021–2026年声誉评价文件中均未出现负面舆情事件，学校声誉整体稳定。抖音热度排名第16位（高热），综合热 度约310万，在985高校中属于较高水平，反映报考关注度持续升温。历史投档异常记录中未见湖南大学出现断档或暴跌信号；第五轮学科评估中，湖南大学拥有 化学（A）、机械工程（A）、工商管理（A）、土木工程（A-）、应用经济学（A-）、控制科学与工程（A-）、电气工程（A-）、计算机科学与技术（A-）等8个A-及以上学科，工 科与管理学科实力均衡，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业在2024–2026年专业热度分析中持续处于高热推荐状态，与湖 南大学优势学科高度匹配，推高相关专业报考热度。北京市2026年高考报名总人数约84900人，较2025年65434人增长约29.7%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧。；湖南大学位于湖南省长沙市，属跨省招生。北京考生对中部地区985高校的报考意愿近年来保持稳定，无明显地域偏好变化。该校在本 省（湖南）招生占比较高，在北京招生人数相对有限（约70人），属于典型的外省优质生源竞争格局。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年回暖趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招 （70→72人）、北京市考生总数大幅增长（+29.7%）以及抖音高热度的报考关注度，在2025年基准位次6561名基础上，预计2026年竞争略有加剧。， 结合考生规模激增和热度因素小幅上修，预测2026年最低录取位次约6704名，区间6204–7204名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约6704名，区间6204–7204名。位次在区间下限（6204名）以内可重点冲刺一档的计算机类、电气类、通信工程等热门工科专业；位次在6704名附近建议以二档的智能制 造、精算学、数字经济等专业为主攻方向，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（7204名）附近建议以三档专业保底，同时可考虑二档中位次要求相对较低的专业。湖南大学工科实力 突出，计算机、电气、控制等学科评估A-，就业前景良好，是北京考生报考中部985高校的优质选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Hunan University in Beijing's comprehensive category were approximately 5971, 6248, 6861, 6693, and 6561 respectively. The overall trend shows an initial decline followed by stabilization: rankings continuously dropped from 5971 in 2021 to 6861 in 2023, slightly recovered to 6693 in 2024, and further recovered to 6561 in 2025, indicating a warming trend in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 6561. The enrollment plan for Hunan University in Beijing's comprehensive category: 63 students in 2021, 68 in 2022, 68 in 2023, 70 in 2024, and 70 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend. The planned enrollment for 2026 is 72 students, an increase of 2 students compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 2.86%. The expansion slightly intensifies competition, putting upward pressure on ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been stable at 29–32 in recent years (31st in 2026), placing it among the top domestic universities, which strongly attracts Beijing candidates. From 2021 to 2026, no negative public opinion incidents were found in reputation evaluation documents, indicating overall stable reputation. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 16th (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of about 3.1 million, which is relatively high among 985 universities, reflecting continuously increasing application attention. Historical admission anomaly records show no signs of gaps or sharp drops for Hunan University. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hunan University has 8 disciplines rated A- or above, including Chemistry (A), Mechanical Engineering (A), Business Administration (A), Civil Engineering (A-), Applied Economics (A-), Control Science and Engineering (A-), Electrical Engineering (A-), and Computer Science and Technology (A-), with balanced strength in engineering and management disciplines, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have been consistently in high heat recommendation status in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, highly matching Hunan University's advantageous disciplines, boosting application heat for related majors. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Beijing college entrance examination is approximately 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% compared to 65,434 in 2025, with a significant increase in candidate scale and intensified competition. Hunan University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, and is a cross-provincial enrollment. Beijing candidates' willingness to apply to 985 universities in the central region has remained stable in recent years, with no obvious regional preference changes. The university has a high enrollment proportion in its home province (Hunan), with relatively limited enrollment in Beijing (about 70 students), forming a typical competition pattern for high-quality students from other provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the warming trend of historical rankings in the past two years, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (70→72 students), the significant increase in the total number of Beijing candidates (+29.7%), and the high Douyin popularity of application attention, based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 6561, competition is expected to slightly intensify in 2026. Combining the surge in candidate numbers and heat factors with a slight upward revision, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 6704, with a range of 6204–7204.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 6704, range 6204–7204. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (6204) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Communication Engineering. Candidates with rankings around 6704 are advised to target Tier 2 majors such as Intelligent Manufacturing, Actuarial Science, and Digital Economy as the main direction, while also considering Tier 1 sprinting. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (7204) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also considering Tier 2 majors with relatively lower ranking requirements. Hunan University has outstanding engineering strength, with disciplines such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Control Science rated A-, offering good employment prospects, making it a high-quality choice for Beijing candidates applying to 985 universities in the central region.
